title: Fancy Hitbox Practice
description: Fancy Hitbox Practice is a client-side Fabric mod that lets you visually shrink player hitboxes (even invisibles) for PvP training, with dynamic colors — without affecting real combat or server mechanics
body:
Fancy Hitbox Practice

Fancy Hitbox Practice is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.1+ designed to help players improve their PvP skills by enhancing and customizing hitbox visuals.

With this mod, you can make player hitboxes appear smaller and thinner visually, allowing better aim practice and tracking training — while keeping vanilla gameplay completely unchanged.

✨ Main Features

Adjust the visual size of player hitboxes

Make hitboxes look smaller or thinner for PvP practice

Works with F3 + B debug hitbox view

Hitboxes are shown even on invisible entities

Hitbox outline can change color when an entity is hittable

Fully client-side and safe for multiplayer

🎮 Controls

Open the configuration menu with: H

🎯 Visual Only (No Combat Changes)

This mod is 100% cosmetic:

✔ Hitboxes can shrink visually for training

❌ The real server-side hitbox stays the same

❌ No changes to combat, reach, or collisions

✔ Perfect for aim improvement without giving unfair advantages

The mod does not affect actual PvP mechanics — it only changes what you see.

👻 Invisible Entity Hitboxes

Fancy Hitbox Practice can display hitboxes for:

Invisible players

Invisible mobs

Any entity with invisibility effects

Helping you better understand positioning during practice.

🎨 Dynamic Hitbox Colors

Hitboxes can react visually depending on combat state:

Normal color when an entity cannot be hit

Highlighted color when an entity is hittable

This makes PvP training more intuitive and responsive.

⚙️ Requirements

Minecraft version 

Fabric Loader

Fabric API

🧩 Multiplayer Support

Because the mod is completely client-side:

Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer

No server installation needed

Only you can see the hitbox changes

Servers will always use vanilla hitbox logic.

📷 Perfect For

PvP Training

Aim & Tracking Practice

Hitbox Awareness

Practice Maps

Content Creators

Train smarter and master hitboxes with Fancy Hitbox Practice.
